name: Zero Risk — Phase Gate Evidence Collector (Webhook)

nodes.name: Structural Validation (Fields)
nodes.notes: Sprint 8 · 2026-05-24 · CC#2 · lenient JSON.parse · gracefully degrades on prose/markdown phase_output · chain surfaces verdicts instead of throwing mid-execution

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "validation_id": "{{ $node['Normalize Request'].json.validation_id }}",
  "phase": "{{ $node['Normalize Request'].json.phase_name }}",
  "verdict": "{{ $node['Extract Validation Verdict'].json.verdict }}",
  "severity": "{{ $node['Extract Validation Verdict'].json.severity }}",
  "structural_issues": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Structural Validation (Fields)'].json.structural_issues || []) }},
  "semantic_issues": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Extract Validation Verdict'].json.issues || []) }},
  "all_issues_count": {{ ($node['Structural Validation (Fields)'].json.structural_issues || []).length + ($node['Extract Validation Verdict'].json.issues || []).length }},
  "rationale": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Extract Validation Verdict'].json.rationale || '') }},
  "validated_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $node['Normalize Request'].json.client_id }}",
  "request_id": "{{ $node['Normalize Request'].json.request_id }}"
}
